metadata.description: Curated Claude Code plugins by Cristiano Aredes — prompt optimization, engineering workflows, and productivity tools.

plugins.name: build-ios-apps
plugins.description: Complete iOS development toolkit: SwiftUI UI patterns, view refactoring, performance audits, Liquid Glass (iOS 26+), simulator debugging via XcodeBuildMCP, plus 22 App Store Connect CLI workflows for builds, releases, TestFlight, signing, pricing, localization, screenshots, notarization, and ASO.

plugins.name: prompt-optimizer
plugins.description: Prompt sharpener, agent-driven workflows, tuning profiles, API injection controls, and CLAUDE.md templates.
